title: The Politics of Calling People Ordinary Evidence Pack
research_question: Can the TWIS article claim that political praise for ordinary people should be judged against policy outcomes rather than tone alone?
scope: Controlled TWIS article/sandbox pack using one article-draft source and one external ONS household-cost source. This pack tests whether Evidence Pack v1 can hold a small article proof trail with one external public source. It is not a full publication evidence pack.
notes: Controlled TWIS article/sandbox Evidence Pack. It now includes one external official public source and remains limited to narrow editorial-method and material-conditions claims.
